title: Native Calculator provider config
description: Configuration shape for the built-in NativeCalculator. Minimal config — NativeCalculator reads tax_rates directly + applies exemptions via ExemptionValidator. No external HTTP.

compound_taxes.description: true = apply tax on top of tax (e.g. Canadian PST computed on price+GST rather than price alone). Most jurisdictions do NOT compound; enable only when your jurisdiction's rules require it.

rounding_mode.description: Rounding mode for the computed tax_amount_cents. 'half_up' is most common (0.5 rounds up). 'half_even' (banker's rounding) is used by some EU regimes.

apply_exemptions_before_rate.description: true = apply the exemption discount to the source_amount BEFORE computing the tax (standard). false = compute the tax first + apply the exemption to the tax amount (rare — some reseller certificates work this way).

fallback_to_zero.description: DEFAULT FALSE = when no rate matches, REFUSE the calculation with TAX_CALCULATION_JURISDICTION_UNRESOLVABLE (fail-safe against under-charging). true = default to 0% tax (compliance risk — only enable when the tenant has verified no rate should apply).
